channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania names four clubs for East Africa Netball Championships in Nairobi
item.description: Tanzania is getting ready to make a mark at the East Africa Netball Club Championships, which are set for May 10 to 16 in Nairobi, Kenya. According to Stella Maclean Mwangomale, the chairperson of Tan...

item.title: Peter Obi stresses focus on national development, not presidency
item.description: Former Anambra State governor and 2023 Labour Party presidential candidate, Peter Obi, don yan say him no dey desperate to become Nigeria president. Him talk am during season 3 of the all-night youth ...

item.title: Shipping Industry Grapples with Equitable Climate Action
item.description: The international shipping sector is at a critical juncture, facing pivotal decisions that will shape its response to climate change and ensure a fair transition for all nations. A recent report highl...

item.title: Kigoma Region Highlights Investment Opportunities in Agriculture, Industry, Tourism and Mining
item.description: Kigoma Region has showcased its huge economic potential during the Lake Tanganyika Trade and Investment Conference. Regional Commissioner Ambassador Simon Sirro explained that the region has many unta...

item.title: Gaza Struggles to Provide Prosthetic Limbs for War Amputees Amid Restrictions
item.description: In Gaza, nearly 5,000 people, including many children, are living as amputees after years of conflict. The shortage of prosthetic limbs has become critical due to Israeli restrictions on importing mat...

item.title: African Catholics Criticise Trump Over Comments About Pope Leo
item.description: African Catholics have expressed dismay following US President Donald Trump's public criticism of Pope Leo during the pontiff's Africa tour. Known for previous controversial remarks about African nati...

item.title: Time for South African universities to update their post-1994 governance model
item.description: South African universities face new pressures from generative AI, cybersecurity risks, shifting labour-market needs and rapid technological change. The current governance framework, designed after 199...

item.title: Kakamega man expresses frustration at siblings during mother’s burial over lack of support
item.description: A burial ceremony in Shinyalu, Kakamega County, turned emotional after a heartbroken man confronted his siblings for failing to help care for their late mother. In a viral video, the man recounted how...

item.title: A Couple Disagrees Over the Best Way to Pack Supermarket Shopping
item.description: Dougie and Teresa, a couple living together, have differing approaches to packing their supermarket shopping, leading to mild tension during their trips to Lidl and Aldi. Dougie prefers to pack items ...

item.title: Minor collision occurs between Akasa and SpiceJet aircraft at Delhi airport, no injuries reported
item.description: At Delhi airport, a minor collision occurred involving an Akasa Airways plane and a SpiceJet aircraft. Fortunately, no injuries have been reported from this incident. Airport authorities confirmed tha...

item.description: The Miss Grand International All Stars 2026 pageant has already captured worldwide attention as past beauty queens and strong contenders begin to make waves in the lead-up to the competition. Accordin...

item.title: Islamabad Tree Felling Draws Ire of Islamabad High Court
item.description: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) has expressed strong disapproval regarding the ongoing cutting of trees in Islamabad, highlighting a disregard for previous court orders aimed at preserving the city's g...

item.title: World Athletics Rejects Favour Ofili’s Switch to Turkey, AFN Welcomes Her Back
item.description: The Athletics Federation of Nigeria (AFN) don confirm say World Athletics don reject Favour Ofili request to change her sporting nationality to Turkey. This decision don end the wahala about her inter...

item.title: Weekly Highlights: Safer Cities in Calabarzon, Scarborough Shoal, and Middle East Updates
item.description: Today's news highlights key developments both locally and internationally. In the Philippines, the Safer Cities campaign in Calabarzon has shown a significant reduction in violations, with authorities...

item.title: Tom Trbojevic suffers another hamstring injury in Manly’s big win over Cowboys
item.description: Manly Sea Eagles will be concerned over another hamstring injury to their star fullback and captain, Tom Trbojevic, after a commanding 38-6 victory against the North Queensland Cowboys in Townsville. ...

item.title: Sid Lowe discusses Spanish football stories and answers readers’ questions
item.description: In a live Q&A hosted by The Guardian, Sid Lowe, the newspaper’s veteran Spanish football correspondent based in Madrid, responded to readers’ questions about various aspects of Spanish football and th...

item.title: CBSE Class 12 Result 2026 Expected by April End, Students Advised to Check Official Portals for Updates
item.description: According to recent reports, the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) is expected to declare the Class 12 examination results for 2026 by the end of April. More than 18 lakh students across Ind...

item.title: Africa Health Worker Shortage and Colonial Legacy: Why Skilled Professionals Dey Migrate
item.description: My people, this article dey talk about how Africa dey seriously lose her doctors, nurses and other health workers just when we need them most. According to WHO, Africa go need between 5 to 6 million m...

item.title: Father loses six children after cult-linked prison contact and deadly fast
item.description: In January 2025, a call from Shimo La Tewa Prison pulled a father back into a deadly cult, leading to the deaths of his six children. The father, a survivor of the Shakahola tragedy in 2023, was conta...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs target top-three finish with Polokwane City clash
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs are aiming to secure a top-three finish in the league with an important match against Polokwane City at the Old Peter Mokaba Stadium this Saturday. Co-coach Khalil Ben Youssef stressed t...
